id.description: Stable kebab-case material id, unique within the project.

shader.description: Shader pipeline. v0 only supports `standard` (Three.js MeshStandardMaterial).

roughness.description: Surface roughness in [0, 1]; 0 = mirror-smooth, 1 = fully diffuse.

emissive.description: Emissive color, six-digit hex. Defaults to #000000 (non-emissive).

alphaMode.description: Blend mode. v0 supports opaque and standard alpha blending.
